title: Ingestion connectors for allowlisted open sources (PMC-OA, CIViC, Open Targets, ClinVar, DepMap, open GEO/cBioPortal)
context: Ingestion connectors pull candidate evidence only from allowlisted open sources, recording full provenance per item. LLM-assisted extraction is assistive only and never emits an assertion without a resolvable citation. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Build ingestion connectors for the allowlisted open sources (PMC-OA, CIViC, Open Targets, ClinVar, DepMap, open GEO/cBioPortal) that record full provenance per item, capture per-article PMC-OA license, never ingest COSMIC/OncoKB (cite-only), and work on fixtures.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulls candidate evidence only from allowlisted sources; records full provenance per item; per-article PMC-OA license captured; COSMIC/OncoKB not ingested (cite-only references)
LLM-assisted extraction is assistive; no assertion is emitted without a resolvable citation; works on fixtures
